description: Sample privacy impact assessment for a new customer data collection form

payload.title: Customer Onboarding Form - Data Collection Review

sections.heading: Data Fields Collected
sections.content: The form collects: full name, email address, phone number, date of birth, residential address, employer name, annual income range, and credit card number for payment.

sections.heading: Purpose of Use
sections.content: Data will be used for account creation, identity verification, marketing communications, and sharing with partner companies for product recommendations.

sections.heading: Retention Period
sections.content: All data retained indefinitely for business analytics purposes.

_evaluation_notes: LEG-001: Purpose of use includes 'marketing' and 'partner sharing' - must be clearly disclosed separately - NEEDS_REVIEW
LEG-002: Third-party sharing with partner companies requires explicit consent, not just a checkbox - VIOLATION
LEG-001: Income and credit card data may exceed 'necessary' scope for account creation - VIOLATION
